---
title: "solutions"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
outcome <-read.csv("data/outcome-of-care-measures.csv", na.strings = "Not Available")
```

```{r}
hospitals <- read.csv("data/hospital-data.csv", na.strings = "Not Available")
```

```{r}
data <- outcome %>% inner_join(hospitals, join_by(Provider.Number))
dim(data)
```

```{r}
hospitals %>% anti_join(outcome, join_by(Provider.Number)) %>% nrow()
```

```{r}
outcome %>% anti_join(hospitals, join_by(Provider.Number)) %>% nrow()
```

```{r}
data %>% group_by(Hospital.Type) %>% summarise(m = mean(Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Pneumonia, na.rm = TRUE))
```

```{r}
data %>% group_by(Hospital.Ownership) %>% summarise(m = mean(Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Failure, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% arrange(m)
```

```{r}
ha <- data %>% group_by(State.x) %>% slice_min(Hospital.30.Day.Death..Mortality..Rates.from.Heart.Attack, n=1, na_rm = TRUE, with_ties = FALSE)
```

```{r}
nrow(ha)
```

```{r}
sum(ha$Hospital.Type == "Acute Care Hospitals")
```
